steps: Log in or create a New Relic account at https://newrelic.com/signup
Click 'Create a key' in the top-right corner
Select key type: choose 'User' for NerdGraph/GraphQL API or 'License' for data ingest
Enter a name and optional notes for the key
Copy the key value — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: User API Key
credential_fields.description: Your New Relic User API key, used in the Api-Key header for REST and NerdGraph API requests

notes: Free tier available with 100 GB/month data ingest and 1 full-access user
User keys start with 'NRAK-', license keys start with a different prefix
Use a User key for querying data via NerdGraph GraphQL or REST API v2
EU data center users must use one.eu.newrelic.com instead of one.newrelic.com
Key is shown only once at creation time — store securely

test_endpoint.description: List monitored applications to verify the API key is valid
